reviews.review_description: When ever I use right hand on the stick I cannot use 2 hands please fix

The game is amazing and I like how the puck slides instead of stopping immediately. But the game has many bugs.￼ I shoot right handed, so when I try to switch it to right handed it switches, but I can’t get my offhand to grasp the stick. Also when you were at the blue line stops, it sends the puck slides a good 15 feet away from you. It is annoying having to chase the puck really fast into the offensive zone to try and make sure it doesn’t go behind the goal line. Overall￼ nice game.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback :) Your comments are correct, the bugs mentioned with further updates will be released in a few weeks.

reviews.review_description: It took me a while to get used to the controls, but after it is a nice little hockey practice game, with different game modes.

I was extremely sad to find you can not adjust the stick. I am 6 foot 3 and I feel like I pretty much have to be all the way bent over to play. It’s more of a pain than anything and I with you could adjust the stick or I could get my money back. Physics seem good but doesn’t matter when I can’t use the stick

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. We apologise for the inconvenience. It is a valid complaint, we are working on it and we will try to fix the problem as soon as possible. In the meantime, we ask for your patience. Have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: Love the game and the fact that if gives me a chance to play since I don’t get much time to go play due to work schedules. I was wondering if in a future update you could add stick length options and the ability to place your hands higher or lower on the stick. I’m 6’6 and have to bend over to play lol but this is an awesome app and I love it. Thanks for making this

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, we appreciate it always. 
We're so happy you're enjoying the game! 
The major updates which will be available in a few weeks will include optimizing the length of the hockey stick. Besides a lots of other exciting stuff :)

reviews.review_description: It needs some polishing, but it's not a surprise, hence it's in alpha state. Until then, it's great for quick fun and practice.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much. Our main goal was to develop a quick and funny game. But it really needs polishing, which will be done soon ;-)

reviews.review_description: I like the app and how it tries to mimic real hockey. I would recommend an option adjusting the game to use a single controller and be able to use the hockey attachment device form https://www.melcher.ca/HockeyVR or https://hockey.sensearena.com/. You would need to figure out a different method to move around but that should be fairly easy task.
